top_signals.title: A bipartisan bridge to the future: Why the Senate must finish the job on digital Assets
Reflecting on Sherwin-Williams Protective & Marine's History with the Department of Defense
top_signals.summary: Sherwin-Williams Protective & Marine partners with the U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) by supplying high-performance, MIL-Spec-approved coatings for a variety of platforms such as aircraft carriers, submarines, armored vehicles and aircraft.

top_signals.title: Windows 11 KB5089573 update released with performance improvements
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has released the KB5089573 preview cumulative update for Windows 11 versions 25H2 and 24H2, which comes with 30 changes, including performance and reliability improvements. [...]
